productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men White Casual Socks
description: Made of 82% cotton, 16% nylon and 2% elastane Wide rib at opening for better grip Three dimensional shaped heel and toe for best Fit Branding printed on the socks Wear these cute socks with trainers when you're working out. adidas ensures that all their products are designed to offer the best performance and these socks are no exception. Sock care Machine wash in warm water below 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not iron, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean
